nasb.text: Although our iniquities testify against us, O Lord, act for Your name’s sake! Truly our apostasies have been many, We have sinned against You.

esv.text: “Though our iniquities testify against us, act, O Lord, for your name’s sake; for our backslidings are many; we have sinned against you.

cnv.text: “耶和華啊！即使我們的罪孽指證我們， 還求你因你名的緣故施行拯救。 我們實在多次背道， 得罪了你。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，虽然我们的罪控告我们， 我们屡屡叛逆得罪你， 求你为了自己的尊名而拯救我们。
